title: AI Artifact Certificate
description: A cryptographically signed certificate attesting to the provenance and integrity of an AI artifact.

artifact_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the artifact in canonical form (RFC 8785 JCS). Format: 'sha256:<hex>'.

artifact_name.description: Human-readable name of the certified artifact.

generation.description: Synthesis or generation metadata (for synthetic datasets).

engine.description: Synthesis engine or method used (e.g. 'ctgan', 'gaussian-copula', 'dp-ctgan'). Value is issuer-defined.

algorithm.description: Full algorithm identifier and parameter specification string.

epsilon.description: Differential privacy epsilon value, where applicable.

public_key_url.description: URL to the issuer's public signing keys in JWKS format.

signature.description: Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical certificate body.

verification_url.description: Direct URL to verify this certificate.
